message.content:
You are a dependency reviewer. Review the InvoiceCashbackPoints screen's imports and dependencies.

CONTEXT:
- Project migrated from Redux to Zustand
- TO_BE_REMOVED folder contains legacy theme code that should be gradually removed
- All imports should use proper paths (relative for local, absolute for external)

YOUR TASK:
1. Read src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx
2. Read src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx
3. Verify imports:
   - No imports from redux folders
   - No imports from TO_BE_REMOVED folder
   - Proper use of services hooks (usePoints)
   - No circular dependencies
   - Compare with InvoiceCashbackOnboarding imports for consistency
4. Check if all imported items are actually used
5. Verify the view.tsx imports are clean (no TO_BE_REMOVED references)

Report any import issues found.

file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  InputBox,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import React, { FC } from 'react';
import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import { formatCurrencyBR, getFormattedPoints } from '../../utils/functions';
import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';

const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  handleContinue,
  points,
  formattedPrice,
  handleChangeReais,
  handleChangePoints,
  handleUseAll,
  pointsValue,
  reaisValue,
  convertionValue,
  pointsError,
  reaisError,
  items,
  pointsQuantity,
  handleModalizeContinue,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  handleSelectEvent,
  height,
  width,
  isLoadingParameterization,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title="Cashback na fatura"
      hasRightIcon
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
        <Text
          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
          type="headingMDL"
          mt="smaller"
        >
          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
        </Text>

        <Box direction mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
            Pontos disponíveis:
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em pontos"
          placeholder="0"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="number-pad"
          value={pointsValue}
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
          error={pointsError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
          textRight="Usar todos"
          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
        />

        <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
          <Icon
            name="icon-switch-vertical"
            size="xxs"
            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
            mr="nano"
            ml="nano"
          />
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em reais"
          placeholder="R$0,00"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
          value={reaisValue}
          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
          error={reaisError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
        />
        {isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
          </Box>
        )}
        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Text type="paragraphMD">
              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de
              cashback na fatura.
            </Text>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
        <Button
          disabled={
            pointsValue === '' ||
            reaisValue === '' ||
            pointsValue === '0' ||
            reaisValue === '0' ||
            pointsError ||
            reaisError
          }
          text="Continuar"
          mt="large"
          mb="small"
          onPress={handleContinue}
          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
        />
      </Box>
      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;

content.content:
1→import React, { FC } from 'react';
     2→import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
     3→import { Box, Text, ListTextIcon } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     4→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
     5→import { Button } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     6→import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';
     7→
     8→const InvoiceCashbackView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
     9→  items,
    10→  hasError,
    11→  hasLoading,
    12→  handleGoBack,
    13→  handleContinue,
    14→  handleRetry,
    15→  cashbackInvoiceList,
    16→  isLoadingParameterization,
    17→  width,
    18→}) => {
    19→  return (
    20→    <BasicScreen
    21→      hasScroll
    22→      hasHeader
    23→      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
    24→      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    25→      title="Cashback na fatura"
    26→      hasRightIcon={false}
    27→      errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry}
    28→      isLoading={hasLoading}
    29→      hasError={hasError}
    30→    >
    31→      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
    32→        <Text
    33→          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
    34→          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
    35→          type="headingMDL"
    36→          mt="smaller"
    37→        >
    38→          Use pontos para pagar menos na fatura
    39→        </Text>
    40→      </Box>
    41→      {isLoadingParameterization &&
    42→        cashbackInvoiceList?.map?.((item, index) => (
    43→          <Box pd="innerLarge" key={`skeleton-${index}`}>
    44→            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
    45→          </Box>
    46→        ))}
    47→      {!isLoadingParameterization && (
    48→        <>
    49→          <Box ml="nano" mr="nano" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
    50→            <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="xs" mt="xxs" type="list" />
    51→          </Box>
    52→
    53→          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
    54→            <Button
    55→              text="Continuar"
    56→              mt="large"
    57→              mb="small"
    58→              onPress={handleContinue}
    59→              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
    60→            />
    61→          </Box>
    62→        </>
    63→      )}
    64→    </BasicScreen>
    65→  );
    66→};
    67→
    68→export default InvoiceCashbackView;
    69→

content.text:
Now I have all the information needed to provide a complete dependency review report.

---

## Dependency Review Report: InvoiceCashbackPoints Screen

### Files Analyzed
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/models/index.ts`

---

### Summary: PASS (with minor consistency observations)

The InvoiceCashbackPoints screen has **clean imports** with no critical issues.

---

### Detailed Findings

#### 1. Redux Imports: PASS
- No imports from `redux` folders detected
- The screen correctly uses `usePoints` hook from `../../services` which is the Zustand-based implementation

#### 2. TO_BE_REMOVED Imports: PASS
- No references to `TO_BE_REMOVED` folder in any of the screen files
- The legacy theme files exist at `src/TO_BE_REMOVED/{colors.ts, models.ts, theme.ts}` but are not used

#### 3. Services Hooks Usage: PASS
`usePoints` hook is properly imported and used. The hook returns:
- `points` - used
- `pointsQuantity` - used
- `isLoadingParameterization` - used
- `requestParameterization` - used

All destructured properties are actively used in the component.

#### 4. Circular Dependencies: PASS
No circular dependency patterns detected. Import chain is clean:
```
index.tsx 
  -> ../../services (usePoints)
  -> ../../hooks/tracking (useScreenViewTracking)
  -> ../../utils/functions (formatting utilities)
  -> ./models (types)
  -> ./view (view component)
```

#### 5. Unused Imports Analysis

**index.tsx:**
| Import | Used |
|--------|------|
| `React, FC, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState` | All used |
| `NavigationProp, useFocusEffect, useNavigation` | All used |
| `Dimensions` | Used |
| `PropsModalizeRef` | Used (modalizeRef1 type) |
| `useScreenViewTracking` | Used |
| `usePoints` | Used |
| `CashbackInvoiceItem, InvoiceCashbackProps` | Used |
| `PropsRootStack` | Used |
| `InvoiceCashbackPointsView` | Used |
| `eventScreenViewV3, eventSelectContent, eventModalView` | All used |
| `getFormattedPoints, formatCurrencyBR, getParsedCurrency, getParsePoints` | All used |

**view.tsx:**
| Import | Used |
|--------|------|
| `Box, Text, ListTextIcon, Button, InputBox, Icon, BackDropBottom` | All used |
| `React, FC` | Used |
| `BasicScreen` | Used |
| `InvoiceCashbackViewProps` | Used |
| `formatCurrencyBR, getFormattedPoints` | Both used |
| `Skeleton` | Used |

#### 6. Consistency Comparison with InvoiceCashbackOnboarding

**Similarities (Good):**
- Both use `usePoints` from `../../services`
- Both use `BasicScreen` template
- Both follow Hook Component pattern (index.tsx + view.tsx)
- Both use `eventScreenViewV3`, `eventSelectContent` from `~/constants/functions`
- Both use the same models structure for `CashbackInvoiceItem`

**Differences (Observations, not issues):**
1. InvoiceCashbackPoints uses `eventModalView` (for the backdrop modal) - InvoiceCashbackOnboarding does not
2. InvoiceCashbackPoints has more complex input handling (currency/points conversion)
3. InvoiceCashbackOnboarding imports `ApiError` component for error states - InvoiceCashbackPoints does not have explicit error handling UI (relies on BasicScreen's error handling)

---

### Conclusion

The InvoiceCashbackPoints screen imports are **clean and properly migrated to Zustand**. No legacy Redux dependencies, no TO_BE_REMOVED references, no unused imports, and no circular dependencies detected. The screen follows the established patterns consistent with InvoiceCashbackOnboarding.
